name: Salame Cones
recipeIngredient: 1 package sliced Gallo Italian Salami, 6 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese and pesto sauce in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Cut each slice of salami down to its center lengthwise.
3. Place the salami slices in an egg carton or mini-muffin tins.
4. Pipe the filling mixture into each salami cone, being careful not to overfill.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Delicious!
